name: Spill only log-like artifact content
description: When storing artifact bundles, keep metadata such as cwd and command inline in SQLite and spill only oversized log-like payload fields such as output, terminalOutput, and debugOutput. Stage spill files in a temp directory and rename into place so duplicate ids or failed writes do not clobber an existing artifact directory.

title: Derive artifact spill storage from the backend data directory
rationale: ULR-50 stores artifact spill files under a backend-owned artifacts root derived from the directory containing ULTRA_DB_PATH so capture storage stays outside project sandboxes and does not require a second storage-path environment variable.

name: Runtime artifact capture buffer
description: Capture runtime artifacts from terminal sessions using a separate larger in-memory transcript buffer so persisted artifacts can include more managed-session output without changing the UI-facing recentOutput limit.

name: Generic runtime supervisor foundation
description: ULR-38 adds a generic backend RuntimeSupervisor with an adapter-backed process handle registry, explicit bounded restart policy, and persisted health transitions so later ov watch, coordinator, and watchdog services can reuse one supervision core instead of each inventing their own process lifecycle.

name: runtime-global-watch-health-surface
description: ULR-39 exposes global ov_watch health with a narrow runtime surface: use runtime.list_global_components for recovery reads, runtime.component_updated for live component transitions, and suppress transient down emissions when a supervisor creates a new component row before a successful spawn.

name: coordinator-thread-routing
description: Project coordinator routing should stay behind a lazy project-scoped CoordinatorService that reuses RuntimeSupervisor handles, projects coordinator events into thread_messages/thread_events, and treats thread message send/retry/pause/resume as successful once NDJSON commands are durably written to the coordinator transport.

title: Preserve main thread message contract during coordinator merges
rationale: Thread UI and workflows on main already consume ThreadMessageSnapshot as role/content.text with threads.send_message returning a message snapshot. Coordinator lifecycle merges should keep that public shape stable and add project-aware routing as an optional extension so thread detail, socket reads, and coordinator dispatch can coexist without frontend regressions.

name: watchdog helper transport
description: Project watchdogs reuse the interactive supervised-process transport: coordinators send normalized heartbeat snapshots over NDJSON stdin, helpers emit probe_result lines, and the backend maps those probes into runtime health plus thread.health_changed without changing execution_state.

title: Separate project runtime and component streams
rationale: ULR-87 keeps runtime.component_updated as the low-level component stream and adds project-scoped runtime.project_runtime_updated plus runtime.health_updated so the frontend can subscribe to aggregate project health without inferring it from raw component churn.

content: Cmd+K Claude command generation should use '--dangerously-skip-permissions' in TerminalCommandGenService.buildCliArgs rather than '--permission-mode bypassPermissions'; keep backend test expectations pinned to the exact Claude arg array for regression coverage.
Terminal command generation for provider=claude in TerminalCommandGenService.buildCliArgs should pass --dangerously-skip-permissions and tests should assert the full ordered Claude argument list.

name: command-gen-close-null-diagnostics
description: Terminal command generation should treat close events with null exit code as actionable failures and include normalized stderr snippets in emitted error messages so CLI flag rejections are diagnosable.
